notes: Level 8 packet 20-21 manual review decisions. Closed entries include reasons; open entries are schema work.

telepathy::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed: words, images, sounds, and sensory messages are now explicit communication utility options.
telepathy::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Shared sensory messages utility option.

telepathy::illusion_or_disguise.issue: Closed: detector matched images/sensory messages; the spell creates no illusion or disguise.

telepathy::sensor_or_remote_perception.issue: Closed: sensory-message sharing is communication payload, not a remote sensor; it is now captured under communication utility options.

telepathy::message_or_communication.issue: Closed: willing familiar target, same-plane limit, sensory-message payload, recognition, and meaning comprehension are now utility/control options.
telepathy::message_or_communication.recommendedTemplateChange: Added communication utility options and Target Filter Notes.

telepathy::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: Closed: same-plane requirement and plane-change ending are now represented by Same-plane limit option.

telepathy::conditional_ending.issue: Closed: plane separation ending is now represented by Same-plane limit option.

tsunami::choice_or_mode.issue: Closed: wall dimension choice is now a Water wall dimensions utility option.

tsunami::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Closed: initial and ongoing Strength saves are now separate runtime damage effects, with Huge-or-smaller filter for ongoing damage.
tsunami::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Triggered Applications, Damage Trigger, and Target Filter Sizes rows.
tsunami::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Added immediate and turn_start DAMAGE effects.

tsunami::terrain_or_surface.issue: Closed: water wall dimensions, movement, swim restriction, and falling out are now utility/movement effects.

tsunami::created_object_or_structure.issue: Closed: created wall of water dimensions and duration are now explicit area geometry and utility options.
tsunami::created_object_or_structure.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime area geometry already carries Wall length/height/thickness; added controlOption.

tsunami::resource_or_consumption.issue: Closed: detector matched damage reduction by 1d10 each round, not a resource/consumption mechanic; decay is now in Round decay option.

tsunami::environmental_change.issue: Closed: moving wall, height reduction, damage decay, swim restriction, and ground fall are now utility/movement effects.

tsunami::conditional_ending.issue: Closed: height reaching 0 feet ending the spell is now a Height ending utility option.

telepathy.issue: Actionable open: Telepathy needs communication-channel fields for target familiarity, same-plane range, message payload types, recognition, comprehension, and plane-separation ending.
telepathy.recommendedTemplateChange: Add telepathicLink fields with target familiarity, plane limit, payload types, recognition, comprehension, and break conditions.
telepathy.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime communicationLink object with those fields and not_applicable sentinels for noncommunication spells.
telepathy.canonicalEvidence: Manual level-8 review identified this mechanic from the canonical prose.
telepathy.structuredState: Structured markdown preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.
telepathy.jsonState: Runtime JSON preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.

tsunami.issue: Actionable open: Tsunami needs a moving-wall hazard schema with per-round height decay, damage dice decay, once-per-round damage gate, size-filtered ongoing damage, swim escape check, and height-zero ending.
tsunami.recommendedTemplateChange: Add moving-wall hazard, per-round decay, size filter, once-per-round gate, swim check, and height-ending fields.
tsunami.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movingWallHazard object with current height/damage dice/position and decay rules.
tsunami.canonicalEvidence: Manual level-8 review identified this mechanic from the canonical prose.
tsunami.structuredState: Structured markdown preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.
tsunami.jsonState: Runtime JSON preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.
